json_data.title: Cybersecurity Fundamentals
json_data.reason: This topic complements the understanding of OS resource management and access control by introducing basic threats and protection mechanisms.

json_data.title: Operating Systems Principles (Process & Memory Management)
json_data.reason: This topic delves deeper into the core mechanisms of how operating systems manage CPU and RAM, building directly on the user's current knowledge of managers.

json_data.title: Distributed Systems
json_data.reason: This extends the concepts of resource management and networking to multiple interconnected computers, building on the user's exposure to Cloud Computing.
